dates.notes: Late registration/changes deadline: May 25, 2027. Page notes 'Late registration is available worldwide' with additional fees.
Late deadline: Sept 1; photo upload & standby deadline: Sept 14; initial score release: Oct 6
Late deadline: Sept 29; photo upload & standby deadline: Oct 12; initial score release: Oct 27
Late deadline: Nov 29; photo upload & standby deadline: Dec 7; initial score release: Dec 22
Late deadline: Feb 9; photo upload & standby deadline: Feb 22; initial score release: Mar 16
Late deadline: Mar 23; photo upload & standby deadline: Apr 5; initial score release: Apr 20
Late deadline: May 25; photo upload & standby deadline: Jun 7; initial score release: Jun 22

Late deadline: Jun 22; photo upload & standby deadline: Jul 5; initial score release: Jul 20. Page: 'Deadlines occur at 11:59 pm Central Time.' No July test centers in New York per act.org (July testing in NY starts 2027).

psat.window: October 1-30, 2026 (in-school weekday window); schools may also administer on Saturday, October 17, 2026 (for 2026 only). Students do not register through College Board -- schools choose the date.
psat.note: Original URL https://satsuite.collegeboard.org/psat-nmsqt/dates returned 404; page moved to /psat-nmsqt/test-dates, verified there.

ap.window_2027: 2027 dates not yet published on the AP exam calendar as of 2026-07-06; the page currently lists only 2026 ('The 2026 AP Exams will be administered in schools over two weeks in May: May 4-8 and May 11-15.'). Expected pattern: first two full weeks of May (approx. May 3-7 and May 10-14, 2027 -- unconfirmed).

lead_time_rules.notes: Computed from the published 2026-27 tables: every SAT regular registration deadline falls 15 days before its test date (late registration/changes close ~11 days before, extra fee, available worldwide); every ACT regular registration deadline falls 36 days (~5 weeks) before its test date, with the late deadline ~2.5 weeks before and ACT deadlines closing at 11:59 pm Central Time. ACT also advises taking the test 'at least two months before your earliest college and scholarship application deadlines' (registration.html).
